name: z-bridge-dashboard-static
description: Static HTML dashboard (Task 006). Serve repo root and open /ui/z_bridge_dashboard/.

scripts.start: node -e "console.log('From hub root run: npx serve .  then open /ui/z_bridge_dashboard/'); process.exit(0);"
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('No build step; static HTML/CSS/JS.'); process.exit(0);"
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('No unit tests in this folder; validate via z:bridge:validate at hub root.'); process.exit(0);"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('Lint hub with npm run lint:root from repo root.'); process.exit(0);"
